---
name: Achievement suggestion
about: Propose a new achievement (earned, never automatic!)
title: "[Idea] "
labels: enhancement

**Achievement name:**

**How you earn it:**
(Remember the core rule: it must be EARNED. "Kill Hogger" is not an
achievement - "Kill Hogger before level 11" is.)

**How the addon could detect it:**
(a kill? a zone? a level + condition? See CONTRIBUTING.md for what's trackable)

**Suggested rarity:** Common / Rare / Epic / Legendary

**Should it grant a title?** If so, what title?
